chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Transfer Application No.S-15 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of main case. 05.11.2021. Mr. Zamir Ahmed Kalhoro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aamir Ali Memon, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.1, which is taken on record. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO. J,- This application has been filed to seek transfer of Civil Revision No.26 of 2020 pending before IInd Additional District Judge, Badin to any Additional District Court at Hyderabad. 2. I have heard learned Counsel for the parties. Learned Counsel for applicant submits that civil revision application, when was fixed for final arguments, has been transferred by learned District Judge, Badin without any cogent reason on administrative ground which shows his biasness against applicant and interest in the outcome of revision application. He further submits that applicant has lost faith on all the judges working under District & Sessions Judge in District Badin and therefore this application be transferred to District Hyderabad. 3. No case for transfer of civil revision application is made out on the ground as above. Learned Counsel has not been able to satisfy as to what illegality has been committed by learned District Judge, Badin in transferring the revision application on administrative ground. He has not been able to deny that the District Judge is competent to transfer the case on administrative ground as nebulous as the one taken by the applicant that he has lost faith on all the judges working in District Badin cannot be allowed to undermine the well

Learned Counsel has not been able to satisfy as to what illegality has been committed by learned District Judge, Badin in transferring the revision application on administrative ground. He has not been able to deny that the District Judge is competent to transfer the case on administrative ground as nebulous as the one taken by the applicant that he has lost faith on all the judges working in District Badin cannot be allowed to undermine the well entrenched justice system just because applicant feels so. Absence of any material to show biasness or interest of the District Judge in civil revision application confirms that this application from the very inception was non- maintainable. In any case, in view of the above discussion, I have found instant application meritless and dismiss it accordingly. JUDGE Shahid
